name: senior-engineer-skills
description: A curated set of Claude skills covering the full software engineering lifecycle: idea to spec, architecture decisions, adversarial design review, implementation planning, unit testing strategy, root-cause debugging, documentation, deployment readiness, Figma-to-prototype code generation, and feature traceability across branches and releases.
